subject: Verify WARMUP_PERIODS=13 against actual max lag/window in feature engineering
description: Read thesis/data/preprocessing/nielsen_dvh/build_feature_matrix.py in full, find every lag_k and rolling-window feature construction (grep for 'shift(' and window/rolling constants). Determine the true maximum lookback required (max lag value, max rolling window size) across all features actually built. Confirm this matches the claimed WARMUP_PERIODS=13 mentioned in the handover (i.e. that no feature requires more than 13 periods of history, and that 13 is not an overestimate or underestimate). If build_feature_matrix_bychain.py uses different lags/windows, check it too and note any discrepancy between the two scripts. Write result to plans/P0027_2026-07-10_15-30_csd-eda-reconciliation/findings.md, append-only.
activeForm: Verifying WARMUP_PERIODS against actual feature lookback
